mapper.select: SELECT a.id AS auction_id, a.seller_id, m.nickname AS seller_nickname, m.image_url AS seller_image_url, m.grade AS seller_grade, m.created_at AS seller_created_at, COALESCE(sr.seller_rating, 0) AS seller_rating, COALESCE(sr.seller_review_count, 0) AS seller_review_count, a.type, a.inspection_yn, a.extension_yn, a.status, a.start_price, a.bid_unit, a.vickrey_price, a.buy_now_price, a.bid_count, a.wish_count, a.start_date, a.end_date, a.cancel_date, a.created_at, ai.id AS item_id, ai.brand, ai.name, ai.quality, ai.description, c3.id AS category_id, c3.name AS category_name, c3.level AS category_level FROM auction a INNER JOIN auction_item ai ON a.item_id = ai.id INNER JOIN category c3 ON ai.category_id = c3.id INNER JOIN member m ON a.seller_id = m.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT target_id, AVG(rating) AS seller_rating, COUNT(*) AS seller_review_count FROM review GROUP BY target_id ) sr ON sr.target_id = a.seller_id WHERE a.id = #{auctionId}

SELECT id, item_id AS itemId, winner_id AS winnerId, seller_id AS sellerId, type, inspection_yn AS inspectionYn, extension_yn AS extensionYn, status, start_price AS startPrice, bid_unit AS bidUnit, vickrey_price AS vickreyPrice, bid_count AS bidCount, buy_now_price AS buyNowPrice, wish_count AS wishCount, start_date AS startDate, end_date AS endDate, cancel_date AS cancelDate, winner_price AS winnerPrice, created_at AS createdAt FROM auction WHERE id = #{auctionId}

SELECT id, item_id AS itemId, winner_id AS winnerId, seller_id AS sellerId, type, inspection_yn AS inspectionYn, extension_yn AS extensionYn, status, start_price AS startPrice, bid_unit AS bidUnit, vickrey_price AS vickreyPrice, bid_count AS bidCount, buy_now_price AS buyNowPrice, wish_count AS wishCount, start_date AS startDate, end_date AS endDate, cancel_date AS cancelDate, winner_price AS winnerPrice, created_at AS createdAt FROM auction WHERE id = #{id} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE auction SET vickrey_price = #{vickreyPrice}, bid_count = bid_count+1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE auction SET start_price = #{startPrice}, bid_unit = #{bidUnit}, buy_now_price = #{buyNowPrice}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM auction WHERE seller_id = #{sellerId} AND status = 'ON_GOING'
mapper.update: UPDATE auction a JOIN (SELECT auction_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM bid WHERE bidder_id = #{memberId} AND status = 'INACTIVE' GROUP BY auction_id ) b ON a.id = b.auction_id SET a.bid_count = GREATEST(a.bid_count - b.cnt , 0) WHERE a.status = 'ON_GOING'
UPDATE auction SET end_date = DATE_ADD(end_date, INTERVAL 3 MINUTE), extension_yn = 'YES' WHERE id = #{id} AND extension_yn = 'NO' AND status = 'ON_GOING'
